projects.name: AltKalkis
projects.description: AltKalkis is a customizable all-in-one utility dashboard that combines everyday calculators with live data widgets, so users can do quick math, track useful info, and plan daily tasks from one responsive interface.
highlights: Modular card layout where users can show or hide tools like percent, salary, age, date/time difference, timezone, and currency calculators.
Live integrations for weather trends, market data, NRK headlines, and Ruter/Entur route planning with map preview.
Extra productivity widgets including countdown timer, quote feed, historical events, holiday overview, and a HEX-to-palette color tool.

projects.name: ScaleSnap
projects.description: ScaleSnap is a responsive image measurement web app where users upload a photo, calibrate scale using a known real-world distance, and then tap or click anywhere to get accurate measurements directly on the image.
highlights: Two-step calibration: enter a known length and pick two reference points to convert pixels into real units.
Touch-accurate mobile measurement using pointer events and coordinate mapping so points land where you press.
Dual UI optimized for desktop and phone, with live segment labels and a running results list.

projects.name: Lavendra Frame
projects.description: Lavendra Frame is a browser-based video editor that runs fully client-side with FFmpeg WebAssembly, so users can import clips, edit on a timeline, and export directly from the browser without uploading files to a server.
highlights: Multi-track timeline editing with split, move, delete, and keyboard shortcuts for fast clip arrangement.
Built-in crop, scale, and audio controls (mute, gain/volume) with live preview tools including audio level meters.
Flexible export pipeline with MP4/WebM/GIF output, CRF quality mode, and target-size compression with retry limits.

projects.name: The Component Expert
projects.description: An interactive learning platform designed to help users understand computer components and how they work together. It offers clear explanations, visual interaction, and a quiz to reinforce knowledge.
highlights: Interactive component images with zoom feature
Includes a quiz for knowledge reinforcement
Simple navigation for easy exploration
